mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (ORD_ID, USER_ID, ORD_NM, TOT_AMT, ORD_STAT_CD, POINT_AMT, POINT_TYPE) VALUES ( #{ordId}, #{userId}, #{ordNm}, #{totAmt}, #{ordStatCd}, #{pointAmt}, #{pointType} )
INSERT INTO ORDER_ITEM (ORD_SN, PROD_DIV_CD, PROD_SN, PROD_NM, PROD_PRICE, ITEM_QTY) VALUES ( #{ordSn}, #{prodDivCd}, #{prodSn}, #{prodNm}, #{prodPrice}, NVL(#{itemQty}, 1) )
mapper.select: SELECT ORD_SN, ORD_ID, USER_ID, ORD_NM, TOT_AMT, ORD_STAT_CD, POINT_AMT, POINT_TYPE, CANCEL_RSN_CD, CANCEL_RSN_DTL, CANCEL_REQ_DT, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM ORDERS WHERE ORD_ID = #{ordId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET ORD_STAT_CD = #{ordStatCd}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn}
UPDATE ORDERS SET ORD_STAT_CD = 'EXPIRED', MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ORD_STAT_CD = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT TEXTBOOK_NM AS PROD_NM, SALE_PRC_AMT AS PROD_PRICE FROM TEXTBOOK WHERE TEXTBOOK_SN = #{prodSn} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT ORD_SN, ORD_ID, USER_ID, ORD_NM, TOT_AMT, ORD_STAT_CD, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ORDER_ITEM oi WHERE oi.ORD_SN = o.ORD_SN AND oi.PROD_DIV_CD = 'TEXTBOOK' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HAS_TEXTBOOK FROM ORDERS o
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{paginationInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paginationInfo.screenSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT oi.ORD_ITEM_SN , oi.ORD_SN , oi.PROD_DIV_CD , oi.PROD_SN , oi.PROD_NM , oi.PROD_PRICE , oi.ITEM_QTY , oi.REG_DT , case when oi.PROD_DIV_CD = 'COURSE' then (select THMB_IMG from COURSE where COURSE_SN = oi.PROD_SN) when oi.PROD_DIV_CD = 'TEXTBOOK' then (select THMB_IMG from TEXTBOOK where TEXTBOOK_SN = oi.PROD_SN) else null end as PROD_IMG
FROM ORDER_ITEM oi inner join ORDERS os on oi.ORD_SN = os.ORD_SN WHERE oi.ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND os.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT o.ORD_SN, o.ORD_ID, o.USER_ID, o.ORD_NM, o.TOT_AMT, o.ORD_STAT_CD, o.CANCEL_RSN_CD, o.CANCEL_RSN_DTL, o.CANCEL_REQ_DT, o.REG_DT, o.MDFCN_DT FROM ORDERS o
ORDER BY o.REG_DT
ASC DESC
OFFSET #{paginationInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paginationInfo.screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT ORD_SN, ORD_ID, USER_ID, ORD_NM, TOT_AMT, ORD_STAT_CD, CANCEL_RSN_CD, CANCEL_RSN_DTL, CANCEL_REQ_DT, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM ORDERS WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDERS SET ORD_STAT_CD = 'CANCEL_REQUESTED', CANCEL_RSN_CD = #{cancelRsnCd}, CANCEL_RSN_DTL = #{cancelRsnDtl}, CANCEL_REQ_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ORD_STAT_CD = 'PAID'
UPDATE ORDERS SET ORD_STAT_CD = 'CANCELED', MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ORD_SN = #{ordSn} AND ORD_STAT_CD = 'CANCEL_REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT ORD_SN, ORD_ID, USER_ID, ORD_NM, TOT_AMT, ORD_STAT_CD, CANCEL_RSN_CD, CANCEL_RSN_DTL, CANCEL_REQ_DT, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM ORDERS WHERE ORD_STAT_CD = 'CANCEL_REQUESTED' ORDER BY CANCEL_REQ_DT DESC
